a:T1104,<div class="question">
<p>Some transitions between the energy states of a particular atom are shown.</p>
<p><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="display:block;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;"/></p>
<p>Energy transition E<sub>3</sub> gives rise to a photon of green light. Which transition will give rise to a photon of longer wavelength?</p>
<p>A.  E<sub>1</sub></p>
<p>B.  E<sub>2</sub></p>
<p>C.  E<sub>4</sub></p>
<p>D.  E<sub>5</sub></p>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/physics/topic/7/","children":["← back to ","Physics"," topic ","7"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"22M.1.SL.TZ1.24"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Physics"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","1"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"22M"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","7-1-discrete-energy-and-radioactivity"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>C</p>\n</div>"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>This question was well answered by SL candidates, although answer A was a distractor for many.
